title: Skill Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter schema for SKILL.md. The portable core of a skill is defined by this frontmatter and the markdown body.

name.description: Stable identifier. Must match the skill directory name and use lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only.

description.description: One-sentence routing surface. Tells the agent when to load the skill.

version.description: Optional semantic version. Consider adding one once the skill is shared, consumed, or versioned.

author.description: Human or team responsible for the skill.

verification_level.description: Verification level for the skill. See GOVERNANCE.md.

invocation.description: How the skill is reached. model-invoked skills are held in context for autonomous routing; user-invoked skills are only reachable by name.

allowed-tools.description: Harness hint: tools the skill is allowed to use.

disallowed-tools.description: Harness hint: tools the skill must not use.

disable-model-invocation.description: Harness hint: true is equivalent to invocation: user-invoked.

globs.description: Harness hint: file globs that scope the skill.

paths.description: Harness hint: explicit paths that scope the skill.

allOf.description: If disable-model-invocation is true, invocation must not disagree.
